title: kielmeyera pumila var. pumila
intro: Kielmeyera pumila var. pumila, also known as Dwarf Kielmeyera, is a plant species in the family Calophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Kielmeyera pumila var. pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
